Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Continued To Feb-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Oliver for Sharon Shanks.

The accounting petition was continued to February 25, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a 13100 declaration signed by the Wife and a certified copy of Angelo's death certificate.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Continued To Apr-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gordon Oliver for the Estate.

Counsel reported that he did not find a way to close the estate without appointing a new personal representative. He will have to get a new personal repsresentative appointed. The matter was continued to April 30, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for one time. Counsel must file a report or petition at least four days prior to the next hearing.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-05-2012 Continued To Apr-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gordon Oliver for Angelo Rebizzo (Executor).

Mr. Oliver reported that Mr. Rebizzo passed away on February 8, 2012. He also reported that all accounts have been transferred and there are no assets in this estate. The Court questioned the one account transferred without court approval and that an accounting is still needed for what the executor have done. The Status on filing of an appropriate petition was continued to April 2, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Continued To Feb-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Oliver for Angelo Rebizzo.

Status of close of the Estate was continued to February 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the Inventory and Appraisal.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Tauscher.
